calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Wei Qiang Chen and Hui Yun Tan (parents) present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the minors Eddie Chen and Vincent Chen, placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to Carson Kien Jin Chen and Vincent Jin Ngi Chen.
Decree Changing Name of the minors was submitted to and signed by the Court.
